---
title: "Deep Learning with Airborne Laser Scanning Data for Forest Inventories"
subtitle: "Hands-on workshop"
author:
  - name: "Brent A. Murray"
    affiliation: "University of British Columbia – Integrated Remote Sensing Studio"
  - name: "Harry Seely"
    affiliation: "University of British Columbia – Integrated Remote Sensing Studio"
  - name: "Yuwei Cao"
    affiliation: "University of British Columbia – Integrated Remote Sensing Studio"
  - name: "Ahmed Ragab"
    affiliation: "Natural Resources Canada - CanmetENERGY;<br>Polytechnique Montreal - Department of Mathematics and Industrial Engineering"
format:
  html:
    toc: True
---

::: {.hero}
## Setup
This is an introductory workshop for deep learning techniques for Enhanced Forest Inventories (EFIs) presented at the Canadian Cross-Country EFI Checkup. To get ready for this workshop follow the links below.

[Get Started](setup.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [View Schedule](schedule.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## Overview
This workshop covers a basic end-to-end deep learning workflow for EFI applications, covering an introduction into deep learning, to data preparation, and finally a demo of model training, evaluation, and deployment. There will also be some examples of real world forest inventory deep learning applications showcasing some of the possibilities there are with these techniques.

### You will learn
- What deep learning is and how it can be used for EFIs.
- How to prepare and read in data for use in deep learning.
- Basics of using the <a href="https://lightning.ai/docs/pytorch/stable/" target="_blank">PyTorch Lightning</a> deep learning library.
- Deep learning based forest attribute feature extraction.
- Training a deep learning model for classification tasks.
- Testing and evaluating deep learning models.


## Instructors
| Name | Affiliation |
|---|---|
| <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Brent-Murray-4" target="_blank">Brent A. Murray</a> | Integrated Remote Sensing Studio. University of British Columbia |
| <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Harry-Seely" target="_blank">Harry Seely</a> | Integrated Remote Sensing Studio. University of British Columbia |
| <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Yuwei-Cao-2?ev=hdr_xprf" target="_blank">Yuwei Cao</a> | Integrated Remote Sensing Studio. University of British Columbia |
| <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Ahmed-Ragab-17" target="_blank">Ahmed Ragab</a> | CanmetENERGY. Natural Resrouces Canada;<br>Department of Mathematics and Industrial Engineering. Polytechnique Montreal |
